column1: # privilege-tiers.tsv — the sensitivity ladder for this KB (the `privilege:` frontmatter value).
# Ordered least to most sensitive by rank. Lowest rank is the default (nothing confidential).
# roles.tsv grants each published role a subset; classify maps keyword buckets to tiers;
# Columns: tier<TAB>rank<TAB>classify<TAB>note   (classify = keyword bucket: business | personal | -)

column4: contracts, rates, financial statements, tax filings, banking
HR, payroll (T4/T5), benefits, anything with personal identifiers
